scope: single-seed from-scratch qualification of exact count-constrained parent-action-quotient site assignment conditioned on oracle composition

source.dataset: qualified H0-E-v4 O1-v1 species-free parent carriers and target-only occupational colorings
source.split_axis: frozen material-disjoint GaugeFlow train/val/test assignment split

scientific_contract.law: p(A|C_oracle,O_parent) with exact composition counts and parent-action unique-orbit quotient likelihood
scientific_contract.normalization: mixed-radix remaining-count dynamic program over the complete legal assignment space
scientific_contract.parent_action_measure: faithful finite-site image with duplicate operation multiplicity removed
scientific_contract.model_family: permutation-equivariant composition-conditioned unary energy on species-free parent-action site signatures
scientific_contract.family_limit: sites in one parent action orbit necessarily have equal unary scores; the target-orbit probability ceiling is reported and never used as an input
scientific_contract.map_role: global labeling MAP uses max-sum DP but remains diagnostic because deterministic tie breaking can depend on an arbitrary row order
scientific_contract.fixed_cif_role: diagnostic only and excluded from qualification

evaluation.aggregation: mean over carriers within material, then mean over materials

decision_rule.pass: qualify only oracle-C count-constrained assignment and freeze its checkpoint; generated-C exposure, p(N), L1 and M1 remain blocked
decision_rule.fail: stop before generated-C, p(N), L1 or M1 and attribute failure to unary assignment energy, carrier identifiability or unresolved symmetry-inequivalent global coloring without adding target-derived inputs
decision_rule.boundary: This Gate cannot qualify generated-C assignment, p(N), L1/M1, free joint H1a, tensor conditioning or guidance, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT.
